scripts.sync-version: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const t=fs.readFileSync('../pyproject.toml','utf8');const m=t.match(/version\s*=\s*[\"'](.+?)[\"']/);if(!m){console.error('version not found in pyproject.toml');process.exit(1)}const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));p.version=m[1];fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n')"
